message:
🌱 Add openfga: Excessive DNS Queries After Upgrading to 1.8.14 mission (#1416)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,83 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "openfga-2504-excessive-dns-queries-after-upgrading-to-1-8-14",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "openfga: Excessive DNS Queries After Upgrading to 1.8.14",
+    "description": "Excessive DNS Queries After Upgrading to 1.8.14. This issue affects 5+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify openfga troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your openfga deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n openfga -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfga\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfga -n openfga --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review openfga configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant openfga configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n openfga -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfga\nkubectl get configmap -n openfga -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=openfga\n```\nHello OpenFGA team,\n\nAfter upgrading to version 1.8.14, we experienced a significant spike in DNS queries from our OpenFGA deployment, which led to a production incident."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Excessive DNS Queries After Upgrading to 1.8.14",
+        "description": "thank you for that detailed analysis!\n\nI ran a similar test against version 1.8.14:\n```\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_MAX_OPEN_CONNS=20\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_MAX_IDLE_CONNS=20\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_CONN_MAX_IDLE_TIME=600s\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_CONN_MAX_LIFETIME (not set)\n```\n\nI observed my connections being reused\n```yaml\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_MAX_OPEN_CONNS=20\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_MAX_IDLE_CONNS=20\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_CONN_MAX_IDLE_TIME=600s\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_CONN_MAX_LIFETIME (not set)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade openfga to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade openfga:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade openfga openfga/openfga --namespace openfga\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n openfga\nhelm list -n openfga\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Excessive DNS Queries After Upgrading to 1.8.14 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openfga -n openfga --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n openfga --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "thank you for that detailed analysis!\n\nI ran a similar test against version 1.8.14:\n```\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_MAX_OPEN_CONNS=20\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_MAX_IDLE_CONNS=20\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_CONN_MAX_IDLE_TIME=600s\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_CONN_MAX_LIFETIME (not set)\n```\n\nI observed my connections being reused appropriately and remaining open when idle for longer than a couple of minutes.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "OPENFGA_DATASTORE_MAX_OPEN_CONNS=20\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_MAX_IDLE_CONNS=20\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_CONN_MAX_IDLE_TIME=600s\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_CONN_MAX_LIFETIME (not set)",
+        "OPENFGA_DATASTORE_MAX_OPEN_CONNS=20\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_MAX_IDLE_CONNS=20\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_CONN_MAX_IDLE_TIME (not set)\nOPENFGA_DATASTORE_CONN_MAX_LIFETIME (not set)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "openfga",
+      "incubating",
+      "security",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "Deployment",

+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/openfga/openfga/issues/2504",

+      "pr": "https://github.com/openfga/openfga/pull/2508"
+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
